title: TikTok Ads 9:16 钩子图
prompt_template: A high-impact vertical 9:16 TikTok Ads image for {product_name}, 1024x1792. Visual hook: {hook_description} (surreal exaggeration, motion energy, or emotional moment). The product occupies 50-60% of frame center. Top 250px clear safe zone (TikTok UI). Bottom 400px clear safe zone (TikTok CTA). Bold condensed sans-serif overlay headline "{headline_text}" in {accent_color_hex} placed in the middle 60% of the frame. Color palette: high-contrast saturated {color_palette}. Style: high-energy direct response advertising, Nike / adidas commercial aesthetic, scroll-stopping, 1024x1792.
